name: welcome-banner
title: Welcome Banner
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: First-time welcome banner with greeting, tagline, progress bar, and dismissible step cards for onboarding flows.
docs: Pass `greeting`, `tagline`, and `steps` array with `title`, `description`, `ctaLabel`, `ctaHref`, and `done`. Use `onDismiss` for dismiss behavior. Provide `renderLink` for framework-specific routing.
